channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Mortgage company Rocket buying Mr. Cooper in $9.4 billion stock deal
item.description: Mortgage company Rocket is buying rival Mr. Cooper in an all-stock deal valued at $9.4 billion, just weeks after buying real estate listing company Redfin.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: Trump expects TikTok 'deal' ahead of deadline
item.description: President Trump indicated Sunday that he expects to reach a deal on TikTok ahead of an April 5 deadline for his administration to begin enforcing a ban on the popular video-sharing app.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: A stroke survivor speaks again with the help of an experimental brain-computer implant
item.description: Scientists have developed a device that can translate thoughts about speech into spoken words in real time.
item.dc:creator: Laura Ungar, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Scientists shielding farming from climate change need more public funding. But they're getting less
item.description: Public funding for agricultural research in the U.S. has been declining for the last two decades, a process Trump has rapidly accelerated by freezing or pausing support for a variety of research programs financed by the USDA, EPA and other organizations.
item.dc:creator: Melina Walling, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: DISA’s Jeff Marshall on aligning tech to solving warfighter problems
item.description: DISA pursues a two-pronged customer experience strategy to ensure its IT services meet warfighters’ needs, the director of J9 Hosting and Compute says.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: Forget Samsung's new modular OLED panels – if this tech works on TVs we could get giant OLED TVs at half the price
item.description: Does this modular tech quietly fix the biggest problem in making huge OLED TVs? Only if it can overcome its own biggest flaw…
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Army Lt. Gen. Jeth Rey on achieving data centricity
item.description: By integrating zero trust into a less complex network infrastructure, the military can access data to speed decisions, Army G-6 deputy chief of staff says. The post DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Army Lt. Gen. Jeth Rey on achieving data centricity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Jason Miller, Federal News Network

item.title: China's telecoms giant Huawei Technologies says its profit fell 28% while revenue surged in 2024
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — Chinese telecoms gear giant Huawei said Monday its net profit fell 28% in 2024 while its revenue surged, as the company invested heavily in advanced technologies.
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: 12 formas de acelerar la transformación digital
item.description: Los directores ejecutivos valoran la transformación y la reinvención, ya que las consideran esenciales para la competitividad actual y futura. Pero una transformación y una reinvención exitosas ya no son suficientes, dicen los altos ejecutivos.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The Pixel Weather app's radar map has mysteriously disappeared and no one knows why
item.description: Users are reporting that the real time radar map has gone from the Weather app across every Pixel phone.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Facebook’s new throwback move: a feed just for friends
item.description: Meta wants to revive Facebook’s old-school appeal by introducing a new Friends Tab, which will focus solely on posts shared by a user’s friends and family. This Friends Tab will replace the section in the app that previously displayed friend requests and suggested friends.
item.dc:creator: Jessica Bursztynsky, Fast Company

item.title: Elon Musk sells X to his own xAI for $33 billion in all-stock deal
item.description: Elon Musk has sold social media site X to his own xAI artificial intelligence company in a $33 billion all-stock deal, the billionaire announced on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Barbara Ortutay, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Musk says xAI buys social media platform X for $45 billion
item.description: Elon Musk said Friday his artificial intelligence firm xAI has bought his social media platform X. "xAI and X’s futures are intertwined. Today, we officially take the step to combine the data, models, compute, distribution and talent," Musk wrote in a post on X.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, The Hill

item.title: Ubuntu namespace vulnerability should be addressed quickly: Expert
item.description: Linux admins who have enabled the unprivileged user namespace restriction in their recent Ubuntu environments should take action to close three new vulnerabilities that allow a threat actor to bypass the supposed protection.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: A Nvidia chip shortage is coming, warns major Chinese server maker
item.description: One of China’s largest server makers, H3C, has flagged potential shortages of Nvidia’s H20 chip, the most advanced AI processor legally available domestically under U.S. export controls, in a client notice seen by Reuters.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: MacStadium and webAI Collaborate to Bring Generative AI Solutions to the Cloud
item.description: MacStadium and webAI partner to offer a business-specific generative AI solution hosted in the cloud, leveraging energy-efficient systems and secure computing platforms.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: DoD Modernization Exchange 2025: Salesforce’s Jamison Braun on adopting a maturity model for ‘natural’ digital transformation
item.description: This five-layer maturity model for digital transformation will break down silos and speed up decision-making at DoD, says Salesforce VP of global public sector.
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Obis, Federal News Network

item.title: Modernize enterprise PC fleets to ensure AI ambitions deliver business success
item.description: Investing in the right kind of PCs helps businesses innovate, become more secure and adapt to new ways of working. They also ensure that enterprises have a foundation from which to implement crucial AI-driven improvements that can boost productivity and growth.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Apple, Meta face modest fines as EU seeks to avoid US spat
item.description: Apple Inc. and Meta Platforms Inc. are set to be hit by fines under the European Union's Big Tech competition rulebook toward the end of next week, with the iPhone maker facing the added threat of recurring penalties under the bloc's Digital Markets Act.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: ChatGPT's viral Studio Ghibli-style images highlight AI copyright concerns
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Fans of Studio Ghibli, the famed Japanese animation studio behind “Spirited Away” and other beloved movies, were delighted this week when a new version of ChatGPT let them transform popular internet memes or personal photos into the distinct style of Ghibli founder Hayao Miyazaki.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and SARAH PARVINI, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: La Cámara de Cuentas de Andalucía moderniza su sistema de gestión financiera
item.description: La Cámara de Cuentas de Andalucía da un paso adelante en la modernización de sus sistemas de gestión económica y financiera para optimizar la operativa contable y los trámites administrativos presupuestarios.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: An AI-based drone that speeds up the detection and monitoring of wildfires is presented in Germany
item.description: EBERSWALDE, Germany (AP) — A company that specializes in early wildfire detection has developed a new, AI-based drone it says will help speed up the detection, location and monitoring of fires.
item.dc:creator: PIETRO DE CRISTOFARO, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Why Tesla may be spared from Trump’s auto tariffs
item.description: As the global auto world reeled from the potential fallout of Donald Trump‘s new auto tariffs, one name stood out as less affected than others—electric-vehicle maker Tesla. The Texas-based company’s shares were the rare automotive stock to trade in the green in U.S.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: The slim phone era is (finally) back
item.description: Smartphones have been around long enough that, to the casual observer, their designs seem to have hit a plateau. And on a functional level, that’s more or less true—we’re all essentially holding the same six-inch-ish rectangle, aside from the occasional foldable exception.
item.dc:creator: Sam Byford, Fast Company

item.title: Meet the DOGE team
item.description: Several members of Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) made their first public appearance as a team to make the case for their cost-cutting efforts amid growing pushback.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: What is 'classified' information? What are 'secure' communications? Here's a primer
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Trump administration's use of a popular messaging app to discuss sensitive military plans — with a journalist on the text chain — is raising questions about security and the importance of safeguarding the nation's secrets.
item.dc:creator: DAVID KLEPPER, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Cyber leaders seek to demonstrate ‘ROI’ in face of DOGE cuts
item.description: The DOGE impact on federal cyber spending remains to be seen, but cyber program leaders are hoping to avoid any major cuts by emphasizing the ROI. The post Cyber leaders seek to demonstrate ‘ROI’ in face of DOGE cuts first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Los Angeles sheriff's department to retest 4,000 DNA samples after using faulty kits for 8 months
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department said this week it will retest 4,000 DNA samples and open an internal investigation after learning that it used potentially flawed test kits for eight months.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Fired FTC commissioners sue Trump
item.description: Two Federal Trade Commission (FTC) members fired by President Trump sued him Thursday, setting up another major test of his administration’s expansionist view of presidential authority over independent agencies.
item.dc:creator: Zach Schonfeld, The Hill

item.title: Figure skating embraces the future with new technology, modern concepts to engage athletes and fans
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Ashley Wagner and Ben Agosto know what it's like to step off the ice at the figure skating world championships and feel as though they've conquered the sport. And what it feels like when the notoriously fickle sport bites back.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Nvidia GTC 2025: News and insights
item.description: Nvidia GTC 2025 has become a landmark event, solidifying the company’s position at the forefront of the AI technology. This year the major theme was agentic AI, which represents a shift from data generation to AI systems capable of autonomous reasoning and decision-making.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Microsoft abandons data center projects as OpenAI considers its own, hinting at a market shift
item.description: OpenAI is reportedly contemplating building its own data center as Microsoft backs off on its own infrastructure investments. OpenAI has privately discussed building and operating its first data center to house storage, which is essential for developing sophisticated AI models.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Judge allows newspaper copyright lawsuit against OpenAI to proceed
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — A federal judge has ruled that The New York Times and other newspapers can proceed with a copyright lawsuit against OpenAI and Microsoft seeking to end the practice of using their stories to train artificial intelligence chatbots. U.S.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, NewsNation
